refactor_items.title: Fix content-type switching — send application/json when no image
refactor_items.description: App.tsx always sends multipart/form-data regardless of whether an image is attached. FR-3 and FR-4 require application/json when no image is present. Add a conditional branch in handleSubmit: when inputImage is null, build a JSON body with Content-Type: application/json; when inputImage is non-null, use FormData as today.

refactor_items.title: ImageUpload — use label-based file trigger for accessibility
refactor_items.description: Replace the button + imperative inputRef.current?.click() pattern with a <label htmlFor> association so the file input is natively linked to its trigger. Improves screen-reader compatibility.

refactor_items.title: Add Shift+Enter regression test
refactor_items.description: Add a test case that fires a Shift+Enter keydown on the prompt textarea and asserts handleSubmit is not called and textarea value is unchanged.
